title: quercus floribunda
intro: Quercus floribunda, also known as the Deodar Oak or Himalayan Oak, is a species of deciduous tree in the beech family (Fagaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of tannins and other compounds. The health benefits of Quercus floribunda include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Quercus floribunda can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
